words.meaning: to try very hard to reach a goal
words.example: Many students strive to improve their English before graduation.

words.meaning: to succeed in getting or reaching something
words.example: The team hopes to attain its sales target this year.
We can accomplish more when each person has a clear role.

words.meaning: to be very good at something
words.example: She wants to excel in science and enter a strong university.

words.meaning: to create or use new ideas or methods
words.example: Small companies often innovate faster than large ones.

words.meaning: to improve something by making careful changes
words.example: He will refine his speech after receiving feedback.

words.meaning: to join things together to make them stronger
words.example: The school will consolidate two programs into one course.

words.meaning: to decide which things are most important
words.example: You should prioritize urgent homework before watching videos.

words.meaning: to make certain that something happens
words.example: Please ensure that every form has a name and date.

words.meaning: to support a rule, value, or decision
words.example: A judge must uphold the law even in difficult cases.
